raw_output_payload.content: find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' -exec chmod 755 {} +; echo $(find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' | wc -l)
raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find all .php under /testbed, chmod 755, count. Use find -type f -name '*.php' -exec chmod 755 {} +; then count with find -printf. Combine: find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 chmod 755; echo $(find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' | wc -l). But need number changed. Use -exec chmod and then count. Use find -type f -name '*.php' -exec chmod 755 {} +; echo $(find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' | wc -l). Provide one line. Use semicolon.
